race.description: Precise Air N E Manion Cup (G3)
race.comment: JUJA KIBO (8) Group 1 Metropolitan placegetter in the Spring, ready to peak third-up. Was a month between runs when he stuck on well to run third over 2000m in the LR Randwick City Stakes (Canterbury Cup). Can hold a forward position from the rails draw and expected to go close. CAMPALDINO (1) got the dream run second-up with a convincing win in the LR Randwick City Stakes over 2000m at Randwick. Gets on-pace favours and will handle the extra weight and trip. Top-three chance. SAM HAWKENS (10) fitter now third-up and getting out to his preferred trip. Only battled on the shifty surface when seventh in the LR Canberra Cup over 2000m. Capable of better on the limit. MR MONACO (14) heavily supported in betting when getting the job done over the 2000m at Randwick in BM88 class. Has the upside to test some of these. KADAVAR (16) undefeated in four runs at this trip and like the way he closed off over 2000m at Randwick. Value contender.
